headline: When to Seek Professional Commercial Building Construction Help in San Gabriel
articleBody:
Knowing when to act can save you time, money, and prevent larger problems. Opus Builders in San Gabriel recommends seeking professional Commercial Building Construction help when you notice any of the following:

• A contractor asks for full payment upfront before any work begins
• No written contract or vague scope of work description
• The contractor cannot provide proof of license and insurance
• Significantly lower bid than all other contractors — often a sign of cut corners
• No references or unwillingness to show previous work

Early action is almost always less expensive and less disruptive than waiting. Call Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 for an assessment — catching issues early means simpler solutions and better outcomes.
